case_title: SHELBY CHU VS. STANLEY CHING ET AL

docket_entries.description: DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 59119530)
JURY FEES DEPOSITED BY PLAINTIFF CHU, SHELBY
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE DISMISSAL PURSUANT TO CRC 3.1385 SET FOR JUL-26-2016 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. THE JUN-21-2016 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

QUIET TITLE - REAL PROPERTY, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHU, SHELBY AS TO DEFENDANT CHING, STANLEY CHING, SABRINA CHING, SAMUEL S CHING, SANDRA DOES 1 TO 25, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR MAR-23-2016 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  DEC-21-2015 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         FEB-29-2016
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF MAR-23-2016 CONTINUED TO MAY-04-2016 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
NOTICE OF SETTLEMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 58936382) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHU, SHELBY

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUN-21-2016 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE MAY-04-2016 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF JUL-26-2016 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 58886674) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHU, SHELBY JURY DEMANDED, ESTIMATED TIME FOR TRIAL: 4.0 DAYS
